This was my manager saying :-

Hi Everyone
i have prepared this sample demo in HTML.. please go through and understand the idea... 
let me know ur thoughts and gaps/improvements in my understanding.


<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ASF · Agentic Scheduling Framework</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#FBFBEF;
  --s1:#FFFFFF;
  --s2:#F5F5E8;
  --s3:#EDEDDF;
  --s4:#E5E5D5;
  --bd:#D8D8C8;
  --bd2:#C8C8B8;
  --bd3:#B0B0A0;
  --c:#1A56DB;--cd:rgba(26,86,219,.08);--cm:rgba(26,86,219,.15);
  --g:#059669;--gd:rgba(5,150,105,.08);--gm:rgba(5,150,105,.18);
  --o:#D97706;--od:rgba(217,119,6,.1);
  --r:#DC2626;--rd:rgba(220,38,38,.08);
  --y:#CA8A04;--yd:rgba(202,138,4,.1);
  --p:#7C3AED;--pd:rgba(124,58,237,.08);
  --t:#1C1C2E;--m:#6B7280;--m2:#9CA3AF;--m3:#4B5563;
  --sidebar:268px;
  --shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.08),0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  --shadow2:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html,body{height:100%;overflow:hidden;}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--t);font-family:"Plus Jakarta Sans",sans-serif;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}

/* ── TOPBAR ── */
.topbar{height:54px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--s1);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 20px;gap:0;z-index:200;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.logo-area{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-right:28px;padding-right:20px;border-right:1px solid var(--bd);}
.logo-img{width:36px;height:36px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:6px;}
.logo-text{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.4px;color:var(--t);}
.logo-text span{color:var(--c);}
.logo-ver{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m2);border:1px solid var(--bd2);border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px;margin-left:4px;}
.tabs{display:flex;gap:2px;}
.tab{padding:7px 16px;border-radius:7px;border:none;background:transparent;font-family:"Plus Jakarta Sans",sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--m);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.tab:hover{color:var(--t);background:var(--s2);}
.tab.active{color:var(--c);background:var(--cd);}
.tab .badge{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;background:var(--s3);border:1px solid var(--bd2);border-radius:3px;padding:1px 4px;color:var(--m2);}
.tab.active .badge{background:var(--cm);border-color:rgba(26,86,219,.3);color:var(--c);}
.topbar-right{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;border-radius:20px;padding:4px 10px;font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;font-weight:500;}
.pill-g{background:var(--gd);border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.25);color:var(--g);}
.pill-o{background:var(--od);border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,.3);color:var(--o);}
.dot-a{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--g);animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;flex-shrink:0;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}

/* ── LAYOUT ── */
.body-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
.content{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:24px 28px 60px;}
.content::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px;}
.content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--bd2);border-radius:3px;}

/* ── SIDEBAR ── */
.ai-sidebar{width:var(--sidebar);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--s1);border-left:1px solid var(--bd);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:-2px 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04);}
.sb-head{padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;flex-shrink:0;}
.sb-icon{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1A56DB,#059669);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}
.sb-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--t);}
.sb-sub{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m2);}
.sb-ctx{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;padding:5px 14px;background:var(--s2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);color:var(--m);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex-shrink:0;}
.ctx-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--c);flex-shrink:0;}
.sb-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;}
.sb-msgs::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
.sb-msgs::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--bd2);}
.sbm{font-size:11px;line-height:1.65;animation:fadeUp .25s ease;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.sbm.bot{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 11px;color:var(--m3);}
.sbm.user{background:var(--cd);border:1px solid rgba(26,86,219,.15);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 11px;color:var(--c);text-align:right;font-size:11px;}
.sbm strong{color:var(--t);}
.sbm .hc{color:var(--c);font-weight:600;}
.sbm .hg{color:var(--g);font-weight:600;}
.sbm .ho{color:var(--o);font-weight:600;}
.sbm .hr{color:var(--r);font-weight:600;}
.sbm .hy{color:var(--y);font-weight:600;}
.sb-sugg{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;padding:0 12px 10px;}
.ssb{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd2);border-radius:5px;padding:6px 8px;color:var(--m);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;text-align:left;}
.ssb:hover{border-color:var(--c);color:var(--c);background:var(--cd);}
.sb-input-row{padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--bd);flex-shrink:0;display:flex;gap:6px;}
.sb-in{flex:1;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--bd2);border-radius:7px;padding:7px 9px;font-family:"Plus Jakarta Sans",sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--t);outline:none;resize:none;height:34px;}
.sb-in:focus{border-color:var(--c);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,219,.1);}
.sb-send{background:var(--c);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:7px;padding:7px 10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;}
.sb-send:hover{background:#1748c5;}
.typing-ind{display:flex;gap:3px;padding:2px 0;}
.typing-ind span{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--m2);animation:td 1.1s infinite;}
.typing-ind span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.18s;}
.typing-ind span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.36s;}
@keyframes td{0%,60%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}30%{transform:translateY(-5px)}}

/* ── SHARED ── */
.page{display:none;}
.page.active{display:block;animation:fadeUp .2s ease;}
.ph{margin-bottom:22px;}
.ph-eye{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--o);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px;}
.ph-title{font-size:21px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.4px;}
.ph-title em{color:var(--c);font-style:normal;}
.ph-desc{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--m);margin-top:4px;}
.card{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:11px;padding:18px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.card+.card{margin-top:12px;}
.ch{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--m);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.ch-l{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
.cdot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.g2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;}
.g3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;}
.g4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;}
.btn{padding:8px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:none;font-family:"Plus Jakarta Sans",sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.btn-c{background:var(--c);color:#fff;}
.btn-c:hover{background:#1748c5;}
.btn-g{background:var(--g);color:#fff;}
.btn-g:hover{background:#047857;}
.btn-ghost{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd2);color:var(--m);}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--c);color:var(--c);background:var(--cd);}
.btn-o{background:var(--o);color:#fff;}
.btn-r{background:var(--r);color:#fff;}
.btn-sm{padding:5px 11px;font-size:11px;}
.btn-xs{padding:3px 8px;font-size:10px;}
.tag{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;font-weight:500;}
.tag-c{background:var(--cd);color:var(--c);border:1px solid rgba(26,86,219,.2);}
.tag-g{background:var(--gd);color:var(--g);border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.2);}
.tag-r{background:var(--rd);color:var(--r);border:1px solid rgba(220,38,38,.2);}
.tag-y{background:var(--yd);color:var(--y);}
.tag-o{background:var(--od);color:var(--o);}
.tag-p{background:var(--pd);color:var(--p);}
.tag-gray{background:var(--s3);color:var(--m);border:1px solid var(--bd);}

/* ── DATA TAB ── */
.src-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.src-card{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative;}
.src-card:hover{border-color:var(--c);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);}
.src-card.on{border-color:var(--g);background:#F0FDF4;}
.src-card.locked{cursor:default;}
.src-card.locked:hover{transform:none;box-shadow:none;border-color:var(--g);}
.src-icon{font-size:22px;margin-bottom:6px;}
.src-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2px;color:var(--t);}
.src-st{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m);}
.src-card.on .src-st{color:var(--g);}
.src-dot{position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--g);}
.dt{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px;}
.dt th{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--m);text-align:left;padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd2);text-transform:uppercase;background:var(--s2);}
.dt td{padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);color:var(--m3);}
.dt td:first-child{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;color:var(--c);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;}
.dt tr:hover td{background:var(--s2);}
.dt tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
.stat-mini{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:9px;padding:12px 14px;}
.stat-v{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:1px;}
.stat-l{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--m);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;}

/* MODAL */
.modal-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);z-index:1000;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.modal-overlay.open{display:flex;}
.modal{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:14px;padding:24px;max-width:400px;width:90%;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.2);}
.modal-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--t);}
.modal-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--m);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:18px;}
.modal-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;}

/* ── KPI TAB ── */
.kdc{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative;}
.kdc.selected{border-color:var(--c);background:#EFF6FF;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(26,86,219,.15);}
.kdc:hover:not(.selected){border-color:var(--bd3);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.kdc-num{font-size:26px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:2px;}
.kdc-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px;color:var(--t);}
.kdc-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--m);line-height:1.5;}
.kdc-wr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;}
.kdc-wl{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m);}
input[type=range]{flex:1;accent-color:var(--c);}
.kdc-wv{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--c);min-width:28px;text-align:right;font-weight:600;}
.kdc-badge{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;background:var(--cm);color:var(--c);border:1px solid rgba(26,86,219,.3);border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px;display:none;}
.kdc.selected .kdc-badge{display:block;}

/* ── RULES TAB ── */
.rules-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 290px;gap:16px;align-items:start;}
.rule-add-box{background:var(--s2);border:1px dashed var(--bd3);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.rule-ta{width:100%;background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;font-family:"Plus Jakarta Sans",sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--t);outline:none;resize:none;line-height:1.6;min-height:70px;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.05);}
.rule-ta:focus{border-color:var(--c);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,219,.1);}

/* RULE PENDING CARD */
.rule-pending{background:#FFF7ED;border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,.3);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px;animation:fadeUp .3s ease;}
.rp-header{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.rp-icon{font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;}
.rp-body{flex:1;}
.rp-original{font-size:11px;color:var(--m);margin-bottom:6px;font-style:italic;}
.rp-ai-box{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.rp-ai-label{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--c);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;}
.rp-ai-text{font-size:11px;color:var(--m3);line-height:1.6;}
.rp-classify-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.rp-type-badge{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:5px;display:inline-block;}
.rp-actions{display:flex;gap:7px;}

/* RULE ITEMS */
.rule-item{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:9px;padding:11px 13px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;transition:all .15s;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.rule-item:hover{border-color:var(--bd2);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);}
.rule-item.editing{border-color:var(--c);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,219,.1);}
.ri-tag{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:1px;flex-shrink:0;font-weight:600;}
.ri-body{flex:1;}
.ri-text{font-size:11px;color:var(--t);margin-bottom:3px;line-height:1.5;outline:none;}
.ri-meta{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m);}
.ri-actions{display:flex;gap:5px;margin-top:6px;}
.ri-btn{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--bd2);background:transparent;color:var(--m);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
.ri-btn:hover{border-color:var(--c);color:var(--c);}
.ri-btn.del:hover{border-color:var(--r);color:var(--r);}
.rules-summary{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.rs-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);font-size:11px;}
.rs-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.rs-label{color:var(--m);font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;}
.flag-box{background:#FEF2F2;border:1px solid rgba(220,38,38,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;animation:fadeUp .25s ease;position:relative;}
.warn-box{background:#FFFBEB;border:1px solid rgba(202,138,4,.3);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;animation:fadeUp .25s ease;position:relative;}
.fb-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px;}
.fb-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--m);line-height:1.5;}

/* ── SCHEDULE TAB ── */
.scenario-bar{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:18px;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:5px;}
.sc-btn{flex:1;padding:9px;border-radius:7px;border:none;font-family:"Plus Jakarta Sans",sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;color:var(--m);background:transparent;}
.sc-btn:hover{background:var(--s1);color:var(--t);}
.sc-btn.active{background:var(--s1);color:var(--c);box-shadow:var(--shadow);border:1px solid var(--bd);}
.kvc{background:var(--s1);border:2px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.kvc:hover{border-color:var(--bd3);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);}
.kvc.selected{border-color:var(--c);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,219,.1);}
.kvc-head{padding:10px 13px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);background:var(--s2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.kvc-kpi{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--m);margin-bottom:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;}
.kvc-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--t);}
.kvc-score{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;}
.kvc-metrics{padding:10px 13px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;}
.kvc-m{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;}
.kvc-ml{color:var(--m);}
.kvc-mv{font-weight:700;color:var(--t);}
.kvc-optimized-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:6px;}
/* GANTT */
.gantt-wrap{overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:6px;}
.gantt-box{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;min-width:700px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.gh-row{display:flex;margin-left:110px;padding:6px 0;background:var(--s2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);}
.gh-tick{flex:1;text-align:center;font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--m);}
.gm-row{display:flex;align-items:center;height:40px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);}
.gm-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.gm-label{width:110px;flex-shrink:0;font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m);padding:0 12px;font-weight:500;}
.gm-track{flex:1;position:relative;height:100%;}
.gbar{position:absolute;top:6px;height:26px;border-radius:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 7px;font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .15s;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;border:1px solid transparent;}
.gbar:hover{opacity:.75;z-index:5;}
.b1{background:rgba(26,86,219,.12);color:#1A56DB;border-color:rgba(26,86,219,.3);}
.b2{background:rgba(5,150,105,.1);color:#059669;border-color:rgba(5,150,105,.25);}
.b3{background:rgba(124,58,237,.1);color:#7C3AED;border-color:rgba(124,58,237,.25);}
.b4{background:rgba(202,138,4,.1);color:#CA8A04;border-color:rgba(202,138,4,.25);}
.b5{background:rgba(217,119,6,.1);color:#D97706;border-color:rgba(217,119,6,.25);}
.bmnt{background:#FEF2F2;color:#DC2626;border:1px dashed rgba(220,38,38,.4);font-size:7px;}
.b-offline{background:#FEF2F2;color:#DC2626;border:1px dashed rgba(220,38,38,.4);}
/* DISRUPTION BANNER */
.disrupt-banner{background:#FEF2F2;border:1px solid rgba(220,38,38,.3);border-radius:9px;padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
.disrupt-banner.resolved{background:#F0FDF4;border-color:rgba(5,150,105,.3);}
.db-text{flex:1;font-size:12px;color:var(--m3);line-height:1.5;}
.db-text strong{color:var(--r);}
.disrupt-banner.resolved .db-text strong{color:var(--g);}

/* ── WHAT-IF TAB ── */
.wi-rules-section{margin-bottom:0;}
.wi-rule-group-label{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:6px 12px;background:var(--s3);color:var(--m);border-top:1px solid var(--bd);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.wi-rule{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;padding:9px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);font-size:11px;transition:background .15s;}
.wi-rule:hover{background:var(--s2);}
.wi-rule:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.wi-rule input[type=checkbox]{accent-color:var(--c);margin-top:2px;flex-shrink:0;}
.wi-rule-text{flex:1;color:var(--m3);line-height:1.4;}
.wi-rule.sandbox-rule .wi-rule-text{color:var(--o);font-weight:600;}
.wi-rule.sandbox-rule{background:#FFF7ED;}
.wi-scenarios{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;}
.wi-sc{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.wi-sc-head{padding:10px 13px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);background:var(--s2);}
.wi-sc-kpi{font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--m);margin-bottom:2px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.wi-sc-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--t);}
.wi-sc-body{padding:10px 13px;}
.wi-metric{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);}
.wi-metric:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.wi-ml{color:var(--m);font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:8px;}
.wi-mv{font-weight:700;color:var(--t);}
/* DIFF GANTT */
.diff-bar{position:absolute;top:4px;height:22px;border-radius:4px;font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace;font-size:7px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 5px;overflow:hidden;}
.diff-same{background:rgba(26,86,219,.1);color:#1A56DB;border:1px solid rgba(26,86,219,.2);}
.diff-new{background:rgba(5,150,105,.12);color:#059669;border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.3);}
.diff-moved{background:rgba(202,138,4,.1);color:#CA8A04;border:1px solid rgba(202,138,4,.25);}

/* TOOLTIP */
.tooltip{display:none;position:fixed;z-index:500;background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--bd2);border-radius:10px;padding:13px;min-width:210px;max-width:250px;box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.15);font-size:11px;}
.tt-title{font-weight:800;color:var(--c);margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;}
.tt-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:10px;}
.tt-label{color:var(--m);}
.tt-val{font-weight:700;color:var(--t);}
.tt-explain{font-size:10px;color:var(--m);margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--bd);line-height:1.6;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- TOPBAR -->
<div class="topbar">
  <div class="logo-area">
    <img class="logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="ASF Logo">
    <div><div class="logo-text">Agentic<span>Sched</span><span class="logo-ver">v3</span></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="tabs">
    <button class="tab active" onclick="showTab('data',this)">📦 Data <span class="badge">3</span></button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('kpi',this)">📐 KPIs <span class="badge">3</span></button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('rules',this)">⚙️ Rules <span class="badge" id="rcBadge">7</span></button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('schedule',this)">📅 Schedule <span class="badge">47</span></button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('whatif',this)">🔮 What-If <span class="badge">sandbox</span></button>
  </div>
  <div class="topbar-right">
    <div class="pill pill-g"><span class="dot-a"></span>Solver Ready</div>
    <div class="pill pill-o"><span style="width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--o);flex-shrink:0;"></span>47 jobs · 8 machines</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="body-wrap">
<div class="content">

<!-- ═══ DATA TAB ═══ -->
<div class="page active" id="tab-data">
  <div class="ph"><div class="ph-eye">Step 01 · Data Layer</div><div class="ph-title">Connect <em>Data Sources</em></div><div class="ph-desc">Select source once · Agent validates · Confirmation required to change</div></div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--c)"></span>Data Source</div><span class="tag tag-g">1 source active · locked</span></div>
    <div class="src-grid">
      <div class="src-card on locked" onclick="tryChangeSrc(this,'CSV')"><div class="src-dot"></div><div class="src-icon">📊</div><div class="src-name">CSV / Excel</div><div class="src-st">● Active · 2 files</div></div>
      <div class="src-card" onclick="tryChangeSrc(this,'PostgreSQL')"><div class="src-icon">🗄️</div><div class="src-name">PostgreSQL</div><div class="src-st">Click to switch</div></div>
      <div class="src-card" onclick="tryChangeSrc(this,'REST API')"><div class="src-icon">🔌</div><div class="src-name">REST API / ERP</div><div class="src-st">Click to switch</div></div>
      <div class="src-card" onclick="tryChangeSrc(this,'MCP Server')"><div class="src-icon">🔗</div><div class="src-name">MCP Server</div><div class="src-st">Click to switch</div></div>
    </div>
    <div id="uploadZone" style="border:2px dashed var(--bd2);border-radius:9px;padding:20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--s2);" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='var(--c)'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--bd2)'" onclick="this.innerHTML='<div style=font-size:22px;margin-bottom:4px>✅</div><div style=font-size:12px;color:var(--g);font-weight:600>jobs_manufacturing.csv uploaded</div><div style=font-family:JetBrains Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m);margin-top:3px>47 rows detected</div>'">
      <div style="font-size:22px;margin-bottom:6px;">📁</div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--m);font-weight:500;">Drop CSV / Excel or click to upload</div>
      <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m2);margin-top:3px;">jobs.csv · machines.csv · workers.csv</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--y)"></span>jobs_manufacturing.csv <span class="tag tag-g" style="margin-left:6px;">47 rows · 8 cols</span></div></div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
      <table class="dt">
        <thead><tr><th>job_id</th><th>machine_id</th><th>duration_hrs</th><th>priority</th><th>deadline</th><th>worker_id</th><th>job_type</th><th>depends_on</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr><td>J-001</td><td>M1</td><td>3.5</td><td>HIGH</td><td>Day2·14:00</td><td>W-04</td><td>Milling</td><td>—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>J-002</td><td>M3</td><td>6.0</td><td>HIGH</td><td>Day3·09:00</td><td>W-07</td><td>Drilling</td><td>J-001</td></tr>
          <tr><td>J-003</td><td>M2</td><td>2.5</td><td>MED</td><td>Day2·18:00</td><td>W-02</td><td>Welding</td><td>—</td></tr>
          <tr><td>J-004</td><td>M4</td><td>4.0</td><td>LOW</td><td>Day4·12:00</td><td>W-09</td><td>Assembly</td><td>J-003</td></tr>
          <tr><td>J-005</td><td>M1</td><td>1.5</td><td>HIGH</td><td>Day1·17:00</td><td>W-04</td><td>Milling</td><td>—</td></tr>
          <tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;color:var(--m2);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;padding:9px;">··· 42 more rows</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="g2" style="margin-top:12px;">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--p)"></span>Agent Schema Analysis</div></div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;line-height:2.1;color:var(--m);">
        <div>✓ <strong style="color:var(--t)">5 entity types</strong> auto-detected</div>
        <div>✓ <span style="color:var(--c);font-weight:600;">47 jobs · 8 machines · 12 workers</span></div>
        <div>✓ 5-day horizon · 2 shifts/day · 06:00–22:00</div>
        <div>✓ <strong style="color:var(--t)">9 dependency chains</strong> detected in graph</div>
        <div style="color:var(--y);font-weight:500;">⚠ <strong>worker_skill</strong> ambiguous → mapped to Resource.capability</div>
        <div style="color:var(--r);font-weight:500;">⚠ <strong>W-04</strong> has 3 consecutive shifts — flagged for Rules</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--c)"></span>Summary</div></div>
      <div class="g2">
        <div class="stat-mini"><div class="stat-v" style="color:var(--c)">47</div><div class="stat-l">Jobs</div></div>
        <div class="stat-mini"><div class="stat-v" style="color:var(--g)">8</div><div class="stat-l">Machines</div></div>
        <div class="stat-mini"><div class="stat-v" style="color:var(--p)">12</div><div class="stat-l">Workers</div></div>
        <div class="stat-mini"><div class="stat-v" style="color:var(--y)">5</div><div class="stat-l">Days</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ KPI TAB ═══ -->
<div class="page" id="tab-kpi">
  <div class="ph"><div class="ph-eye">Step 02 · Objectives</div><div class="ph-title">Define <em>KPIs</em></div><div class="ph-desc">Select 3 · Set weights · Generates 3 separate schedule variants</div></div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--c)"></span>Select 3 Active KPIs</div><span class="tag tag-c" id="kpiSelCount">3 selected</span></div>
    <div class="kpi-def-grid g3">
      <div class="kdc selected" onclick="toggleKPI(this)"><div class="kdc-badge">ACTIVE</div><div class="kdc-num" style="color:var(--c)">K1</div><div class="kdc-name">Minimize Cost</div><div class="kdc-desc">Total operational cost — worker hours × rate + machine overhead.</div><div class="kdc-wr"><span class="kdc-wl">Weight</span><input type="range" min="10" max="70" value="40" oninput="this.nextElementSibling.textContent=this.value+'%'"><span class="kdc-wv">40%</span></div></div>
      <div class="kdc selected" onclick="toggleKPI(this)"><div class="kdc-badge">ACTIVE</div><div class="kdc-num" style="color:var(--y)">K2</div><div class="kdc-name">Deadline Adherence</div><div class="kdc-desc">Minimize jobs completing after deadline. Delivery reliability metric.</div><div class="kdc-wr"><span class="kdc-wl">Weight</span><input type="range" min="10" max="70" value="35" oninput="this.nextElementSibling.textContent=this.value+'%'"><span class="kdc-wv">35%</span></div></div>
      <div class="kdc selected" onclick="toggleKPI(this)"><div class="kdc-badge">ACTIVE</div><div class="kdc-num" style="color:var(--g)">K3</div><div class="kdc-name">Minimize Makespan</div><div class="kdc-desc">Total schedule duration — first start to last finish.</div><div class="kdc-wr"><span class="kdc-wl">Weight</span><input type="range" min="10" max="70" value="25" oninput="this.nextElementSibling.textContent=this.value+'%'"><span class="kdc-wv">25%</span></div></div>
      <div class="kdc" onclick="toggleKPI(this)"><div class="kdc-badge">ACTIVE</div><div class="kdc-num" style="color:var(--o)">K4</div><div class="kdc-name">Machine Utilization</div><div class="kdc-desc">Maximize productive machine time. Reduces idle capacity.</div><div class="kdc-wr"><span class="kdc-wl">Weight</span><input type="range" min="10" max="70" value="20" oninput="this.nextElementSibling.textContent=this.value+'%'"><span class="kdc-wv">20%</span></div></div>
      <div class="kdc" onclick="toggleKPI(this)"><div class="kdc-badge">ACTIVE</div><div class="kdc-num" style="color:var(--p)">K5</div><div class="kdc-name">Worker Overtime</div><div class="kdc-desc">Minimize total overtime hours. Reduces cost and fatigue.</div><div class="kdc-wr"><span class="kdc-wl">Weight</span><input type="range" min="10" max="70" value="20" oninput="this.nextElementSibling.textContent=this.value+'%'"><span class="kdc-wv">20%</span></div></div>
      <div class="kdc" onclick="toggleKPI(this)" style="border-style:dashed;"><div class="kdc-num" style="color:var(--m2)">+</div><div class="kdc-name" style="color:var(--m)">Custom KPI</div><div class="kdc-desc">Define your own formula. Agent translates business goals into solver objectives.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;gap:8px;"><button class="btn btn-c" onclick="showTab('rules',document.querySelectorAll('.tab')[2])">Next: Define Rules →</button><button class="btn btn-ghost">Save KPI Profile</button></div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ RULES TAB ═══ -->
<div class="page" id="tab-rules">
  <div class="ph"><div class="ph-eye">Step 03 · Rule Engine</div><div class="ph-title">Business <em>Rules</em></div><div class="ph-desc">Write rules in plain English → AI classifies → You confirm → Generate schedule</div></div>
  <div id="flagsArea"></div>
  <div class="rules-layout">
    <div>
      <!-- ADD BOX -->
      <div class="rule-add-box">
        <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--c);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;font-weight:600;">+ New Rule</div>
        <textarea class="rule-ta" id="newRuleInput" placeholder="Write in plain English e.g. 'Machine M3 cannot run more than 8 hours without a 30-minute maintenance break'..."></textarea>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <button class="btn btn-c btn-sm" onclick="analyzeRule()">Analyze with AI →</button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="document.getElementById('newRuleInput').value=''">Clear</button>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:9px;">
          <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--m2);margin-right:2px;">Quick:</span>
          <span class="ssb" onclick="document.getElementById('newRuleInput').value=this.textContent.trim()">No machine > 8hrs without break</span>
          <span class="ssb" onclick="document.getElementById('newRuleInput').value=this.textContent.trim()">Workers max 2 consecutive shifts</span>
          <span class="ssb" onclick="document.getElementById('newRuleInput').value=this.textContent.trim()">M2 and M4 can't run simultaneously</span>
          <span class="ssb" onclick="document.getElementById('newRuleInput').value=this.textContent.trim()">High priority jobs start within first 4 hours</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- PENDING CONFIRM AREA -->
      <div id="pendingArea"></div>
      <!-- RULES LIST -->
      <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--p)"></span>Active Rules Registry <span class="tag tag-c" id="ruleCountLabel" style="margin-left:6px;">7 rules</span></div></div>
      <div id="rulesList">
        <div class="rule-item"><span class="ri-tag tag-r">HARD</span><div class="ri-body"><div class="ri-text" contenteditable="false">All jobs must complete before their individual deadline</div><div class="ri-meta">Entity: Task.deadline · 47 constraints · Enforced always</div><div class="ri-actions"><button class="ri-btn" onclick="editRule(this)">Edit</button><button class="ri-btn del" onclick="deleteRule(this)">Delete</button></div></div></div>
        <div class="rule-item"><span class="ri-tag tag-r">HARD</span><div class="ri-body"><div class="ri-text" contenteditable="false">Each machine processes one job at a time — no overlap</div><div class="ri-meta">Entity: Resource.capacity=1 · 8 machine constraints</div><div class="ri-actions"><button class="ri-btn" onclick="editRule(this)">Edit</button><button class="ri-btn del" onclick="deleteRule(this)">Delete</button></div></div></div>
        <div class="rule-item"><span class="ri-tag tag-r">HARD</span><div class="ri-body"><div class="ri-text" contenteditable="false">Job dependencies must be respected (upstream jobs complete first)</div><div class="ri-meta">Entity: Task.depends_on · 9 chains · Agent-inferred</div><div class="ri-actions"><button class="ri-btn" onclick="editRule(this)">Edit</button><button class="ri-btn del" onclick="deleteRule(this)">Delete</button></div></div></div>
        <div class="rule-item"><span class="ri-tag tag-r">HARD</span><div class="ri-body"><div class="ri-text" contenteditable="false">Machine M3 cannot run more than 8 hours without 30-min maintenance</div><div class="ri-meta">Entity: Resource.M3.runtime_limit=480min · Break=30min</div><div class="ri-actions"><button class="ri-btn" onclick="editRule(this)">Edit</button><button class="ri-btn del" onclick="deleteRule(this)">Delete</button></div></div></div>
        <div class="rule-item"><span class="ri-tag tag-y">SOFT</span><div class="ri-body"><div class="ri-text" contenteditable="false">High-priority jobs scheduled in first 25% of planning horizon</div><div class="ri-meta">Entity: Task.priority=HIGH · Weight:0.8 · Penalty:40/slot</div><div class="ri-actions"><button class="ri-btn" onclick="editRule(this)">Edit</button><button class="ri-btn del" onclick="deleteRule(this)">Delete</button></div></div></div>
        <div class="rule-item"><span class="ri-tag tag-y">SOFT</span><div class="ri-body"><div class="ri-text" contenteditable="false">Group similar job types on same machine to reduce setup changes</div><div class="ri-meta">Entity: Task.job_type · Sequence preference · Weight:0.6</div><div class="ri-actions"><button class="ri-btn" onclick="editRule(this)">Edit</button><button class="ri-btn del" onclick="deleteRule(this)">Delete</button></div></div></div>
        <div class="rule-item"><span class="ri-tag tag-c">OBJ</span><div class="ri-body"><div class="ri-text" contenteditable="false">Minimize total makespan as primary CP-SAT objective</div><div class="ri-meta">Solver objective · Weight: 25% from KPI settings</div><div class="ri-actions"><button class="ri-btn" onclick="editRule(this)">Edit</button><button class="ri-btn del" onclick="deleteRule(this)">Delete</button></div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- SUMMARY PANEL -->
    <div>
      <div class="rules-summary">
        <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--y)"></span>Registry Summary</div></div>
        <div class="rs-row"><span class="rs-label">Hard Constraints</span><span style="color:var(--r);font-weight:700;" id="hardCount">4</span></div>
        <div class="rs-row"><span class="rs-label">Soft Preferences</span><span style="color:var(--y);font-weight:700;" id="softCount">2</span></div>
        <div class="rs-row"><span class="rs-label">Objectives</span><span style="color:var(--c);font-weight:700;" id="objCount">1</span></div>
        <div class="rs-row"><span class="rs-label">Agent-inferred</span><span style="color:var(--p);font-weight:700;">2</span></div>
        <div class="rs-row"><span class="rs-label">Pending confirm</span><span style="color:var(--o);font-weight:700;" id="pendingCount">0</span></div>
        <div class="rs-row"><span class="rs-label">Conflicts</span><span style="color:var(--g);font-weight:700;" id="conflictCount">0</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;">
        <button class="btn btn-g" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" id="genSchedBtn" onclick="runSolverRules()">▶ Generate Schedule</button>
        <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" onclick="showTab('whatif',document.querySelectorAll('.tab')[4])">🔮 Open in What-If Sandbox</button>
      </div>
      <div id="analysisFb" style="margin-top:10px;"></div>
      <div style="margin-top:12px;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--cd);border:1px solid rgba(26,86,219,.2);border-radius:8px;font-size:10px;color:var(--c);line-height:1.6;">
        <strong>2-step process:</strong> First confirm AI classifications above, then generate schedule. Pending rules must be confirmed or rejected before solving.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ SCHEDULE TAB ═══ -->
<div class="page" id="tab-schedule">
  <div class="ph"><div class="ph-eye">Step 04 · Output</div><div class="ph-title">Schedule <em>View</em></div><div class="ph-desc">Base plan · Dynamic re-schedule · 3 KPI-optimized variants per mode</div></div>
  <div class="scenario-bar">
    <button class="sc-btn active" onclick="setMode(this,'base')">📋 Base Plan</button>
    <button class="sc-btn" onclick="setMode(this,'dynamic')">⚡ Dynamic Re-schedule</button>
  </div>
  <div class="disrupt-banner" id="disruptBanner" style="display:none;">
    <span style="font-size:16px;">🚨</span>
    <div class="db-text"><strong>Disruption Detected:</strong> Machine M3 offline — bearing failure at 14:00. Affects J-002, J-018, J-031. ReOptimizerAgent ready to re-solve affected segments.</div>
    <button class="btn btn-r btn-sm" onclick="resolveDisruption()">Re-optimize Now</button>
  </div>
  <div class="disrupt-banner resolved" id="resolvedBanner" style="display:none;">
    <span style="font-size:16px;">✅</span>
    <div class="db-text"><strong style="color:var(--g)">Re-optimization complete.</strong> J-002→M4, J-018→M6, J-031→M2. Makespan impact: +1.4 hrs. Zero deadline violations.</div>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="this.closest('.disrupt-banner').style.display='none'">Dismiss</button>
  </div>
  <div class="ch" style="margin-bottom:10px;"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--c)"></span>3 KPI-Optimized Variants — <span id="modeLabel" style="color:var(--c);">Base Plan</span></div><span class="tag tag-g">Click variant to view Gantt</span></div>
  <div class="kpi-variants g3" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
    <div class="kvc selected" onclick="selVariant(this,'k1')">
      <div class="kvc-head"><div><div class="kvc-kpi">Optimized for</div><div class="kvc-name">K1 · Minimize Cost</div></div><div class="kvc-score" style="color:var(--c)">82/100</div></div>
      <div class="kvc-metrics">
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Total Cost</span><span class="kvc-mv">₹4.2L</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Makespan</span><span class="kvc-mv">4.8d</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Violations</span><span class="kvc-mv" style="color:var(--g)">0</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Utilization</span><span class="kvc-mv">84%</span></div>
        <div><span class="kvc-optimized-badge" style="background:var(--cd);color:var(--c);border:1px solid rgba(26,86,219,.2);">⬤ Cost batching strategy</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kvc" onclick="selVariant(this,'k2')">
      <div class="kvc-head"><div><div class="kvc-kpi">Optimized for</div><div class="kvc-name">K2 · Deadline First</div></div><div class="kvc-score" style="color:var(--y)">91/100</div></div>
      <div class="kvc-metrics">
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Total Cost</span><span class="kvc-mv">₹5.1L</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Makespan</span><span class="kvc-mv">4.2d</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Violations</span><span class="kvc-mv" style="color:var(--g)">0</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Utilization</span><span class="kvc-mv">87%</span></div>
        <div><span class="kvc-optimized-badge" style="background:var(--yd);color:var(--y);border:1px solid rgba(202,138,4,.2);">⬤ Front-load HIGH priority</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kvc" onclick="selVariant(this,'k3')">
      <div class="kvc-head"><div><div class="kvc-kpi">Optimized for</div><div class="kvc-name">K3 · Min Makespan</div></div><div class="kvc-score" style="color:var(--g)">88/100</div></div>
      <div class="kvc-metrics">
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Total Cost</span><span class="kvc-mv">₹4.8L</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Makespan</span><span class="kvc-mv" style="color:var(--g)">3.8d</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Violations</span><span class="kvc-mv" style="color:var(--g)">0</span></div>
        <div class="kvc-m"><span class="kvc-ml">Utilization</span><span class="kvc-mv">91%</span></div>
        <div><span class="kvc-optimized-badge" style="background:var(--gd);color:var(--g);border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.2);">⬤ Parallel machine usage</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="ch" style="margin-bottom:10px;"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--g)"></span>Gantt · <span id="varLabel" style="color:var(--c);">K1 Cost-Optimized</span></div><span class="tag tag-c">Click bars for AI explanation</span></div>
  <div class="gantt-wrap"><div class="gantt-box"><div class="gh-row" id="ganttHead"></div><div id="ganttRows"></div></div></div>
  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m2);margin:8px 0 0;">Click any bar → PlanExplainerAgent reasoning</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ WHAT-IF TAB ═══ -->
<div class="page" id="tab-whatif">
  <div class="ph"><div class="ph-eye">Sandbox · Isolated from main</div><div class="ph-title">What-If <em>Sandbox</em></div><div class="ph-desc">Main plan frozen · Add rules or new data · 3 KPI variants · Compare · Promote if better</div></div>
  <div class="g2" style="align-items:start;margin-bottom:14px;">
    <!-- LEFT: RULES + DATA -->
    <div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:12px;padding:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;">
          <div class="ch-l" style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--m);text-transform:uppercase;"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--p)"></span>Rules — Main + Sandbox</div>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onclick="addSbMsg('Rules synced from main plan.','bot')">↻ Sync Main</button>
        </div>
        <!-- MAIN RULES GROUP -->
        <div class="wi-rule-group-label"><span style="background:var(--c);color:#fff;border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px;font-size:8px;">MAIN</span> Copied from main schedule · uncheck to exclude</div>
        <div id="wiMainRules">
          <div class="wi-rule"><input type="checkbox" checked><span class="wi-rule-text">All jobs complete before deadline</span><span class="tag tag-r" style="margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;">HARD</span></div>
          <div class="wi-rule"><input type="checkbox" checked><span class="wi-rule-text">No machine overlap (capacity=1)</span><span class="tag tag-r" style="margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;">HARD</span></div>
          <div class="wi-rule"><input type="checkbox" checked><span class="wi-rule-text">Job dependencies respected</span><span class="tag tag-r" style="margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;">HARD</span></div>
          <div class="wi-rule"><input type="checkbox" checked><span class="wi-rule-text">M3 max 8hr runtime + maintenance</span><span class="tag tag-r" style="margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;">HARD</span></div>
          <div class="wi-rule"><input type="checkbox" checked><span class="wi-rule-text">High-priority jobs front-loaded</span><span class="tag tag-y" style="margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;">SOFT</span></div>
          <div class="wi-rule"><input type="checkbox"><span class="wi-rule-text">Group similar job types on same machine</span><span class="tag tag-y" style="margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;">SOFT</span></div>
        </div>
        <!-- SANDBOX RULES GROUP -->
        <div class="wi-rule-group-label"><span style="background:var(--o);color:#fff;border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px;font-size:8px;">SANDBOX</span> New rules — only in this sandbox</div>
        <div id="wiSandboxRules" style="min-height:32px;">
          <div style="padding:10px 12px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m2);font-style:italic;">No sandbox rules yet — add below</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- ADD SANDBOX RULE -->
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--o)"></span>Add Sandbox Rule <span class="tag tag-o" style="margin-left:5px;">does not affect main</span></div></div>
        <textarea class="rule-ta" id="wiRuleInput" placeholder="e.g. 'Add night shift 22:00–06:00 on M1 and M4'..." style="min-height:54px;"></textarea>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:7px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="addWiRule()">+ Add to Sandbox</button>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;">
          <span class="ssb" onclick="document.getElementById('wiRuleInput').value=this.textContent.trim()">Add night shift M1+M4</span>
          <span class="ssb" onclick="document.getElementById('wiRuleInput').value=this.textContent.trim()">Add 9th machine (copy M3)</span>
          <span class="ssb" onclick="document.getElementById('wiRuleInput').value=this.textContent.trim()">Remove overtime constraint</span>
          <span class="ssb" onclick="document.getElementById('wiRuleInput').value=this.textContent.trim()">Increase M5 capacity 20%</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- ADD SANDBOX DATA -->
      <div class="card">
        <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--g)"></span>Add Sandbox Data <span class="tag tag-o" style="margin-left:5px;">overlay / merge</span></div></div>
        <div style="border:2px dashed var(--bd2);border-radius:8px;padding:16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:var(--s2);transition:all .2s;" id="wiUploadZone" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='var(--g)'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--bd2)'" onclick="wiUploadData()">
          <div style="font-size:18px;margin-bottom:4px;">📂</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--m);font-weight:500;">Upload CSV to overlay onto sandbox data</div>
          <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m2);margin-top:2px;">New jobs · Updated deadlines · Extra machines</div>
        </div>
        <div id="wiDataStatus" style="margin-top:8px;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- RIGHT: SIMULATE -->
    <div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--o)"></span>Simulate Sandbox</div></div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--m);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:12px;"><strong style="color:var(--t)">Main schedule is not affected.</strong> Runs CP-SAT with sandbox rules + data. Generates 3 KPI variants for comparison.</div>
        <button class="btn btn-o" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" onclick="runWiSolver()">▶ Run Sandbox Simulation</button>
        <div id="wiStatus" style="margin-top:8px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--m);min-height:16px;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- WI RESULTS -->
  <div id="wiResults" style="display:none;">
    <div class="ch" style="margin-bottom:12px;"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--o)"></span>Sandbox Results — 3 KPI Variants vs Main</div></div>
    <div class="wi-scenarios" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
      <div class="wi-sc"><div class="wi-sc-head" style="border-left:3px solid var(--c)"><div class="wi-sc-kpi">SANDBOX · K1 COST</div><div class="wi-sc-name">Cost-Optimized</div></div><div class="wi-sc-body"><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Cost</span><span class="wi-mv" style="color:var(--g)">₹3.8L ↓9%</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Makespan</span><span class="wi-mv">4.6d</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Violations</span><span class="wi-mv" style="color:var(--g)">0</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">vs Main</span><span class="wi-mv" style="color:var(--g)">+4pts</span></div></div></div>
      <div class="wi-sc"><div class="wi-sc-head" style="border-left:3px solid var(--y)"><div class="wi-sc-kpi">SANDBOX · K2 DEADLINE</div><div class="wi-sc-name">Deadline-First</div></div><div class="wi-sc-body"><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Cost</span><span class="wi-mv">₹4.9L</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Makespan</span><span class="wi-mv" style="color:var(--g)">3.9d ↓7%</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Violations</span><span class="wi-mv" style="color:var(--g)">0</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">vs Main</span><span class="wi-mv">+0pts</span></div></div></div>
      <div class="wi-sc" style="border-color:var(--g);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(5,150,105,.15);"><div class="wi-sc-head" style="border-left:3px solid var(--g);background:#F0FDF4;"><div class="wi-sc-kpi" style="color:var(--g)">SANDBOX · K3 MAKESPAN ⭐</div><div class="wi-sc-name">Speed-Optimized</div></div><div class="wi-sc-body"><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Cost</span><span class="wi-mv">₹4.5L</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Makespan</span><span class="wi-mv" style="color:var(--g)">3.5d ↓17%</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">Violations</span><span class="wi-mv" style="color:var(--g)">0</span></div><div class="wi-metric"><span class="wi-ml">vs Main</span><span class="wi-mv" style="color:var(--g)">+11pts</span></div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:12px 14px;background:#F0FDF4;border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.2);border-radius:9px;font-size:11px;color:var(--m3);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:14px;">
      <strong style="color:var(--g)">AutoRankerAgent:</strong> Sandbox K3 ranks #1 — 17% faster makespan with zero violations. Night shift on M1+M4 processes 4 overnight jobs, clearing Day 1 congestion. Estimated additional labor cost: +8%.
      <div style="margin-top:8px;display:flex;gap:8px;"><button class="btn btn-g btn-sm" onclick="promoteWi()">Promote to Main Plan</button><button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">Export PDF</button></div>
    </div>
    <!-- DIFF GANTT -->
    <div class="card">
      <div class="ch"><div class="ch-l"><span class="cdot" style="background:var(--g)"></span>Schedule Diff — Main vs Sandbox K3</div><span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--m2);">🔵 same · 🟢 new/night · 🟡 rescheduled</span></div>
      <div style="overflow-x:auto;"><div style="min-width:520px;" id="wiGantt"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- /content -->

<!-- AI SIDEBAR -->
<div class="ai-sidebar">
  <div class="sb-head">
    <div class="sb-icon">AI</div>
    <div><div class="sb-title">Schedule Agent</div><div class="sb-sub">Context-aware per tab</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="sb-ctx"><span class="ctx-dot"></span><span id="sbCtx">DATA TAB · Schema analysis</span></div>
  <div class="sb-msgs" id="sbMsgs">
    <div class="sbm bot">👋 <strong>Hello!</strong> I've analyzed your dataset — <span class="hc">47 jobs · 8 machines · 12 workers</span> over 5 days.<br><br>I detected 3 items that need attention before generating a schedule. Want me to walk through them?</div>
  </div>
  <div class="sb-sugg" id="sbSugg">
    <div class="ssb" onclick="sbQ(this)">Review flagged fields</div>
    <div class="ssb" onclick="sbQ(this)">What entities were detected?</div>
    <div class="ssb" onclick="sbQ(this)">Take me to KPI setup</div>
  </div>
  <div class="sb-input-row">
    <textarea class="sb-in" id="sbInput" placeholder="Ask anything..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'&&!event.shiftKey){event.preventDefault();sbSend();}"></textarea>
    <button class="sb-send" onclick="sbSend()">↑</button>
  </div>
</div>
</div><!-- /body-wrap -->

<!-- DATA CHANGE MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="changeModal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-title">⚠️ Change Data Source?</div>
    <div class="modal-desc" id="modalDesc">Switching to a new source will clear the current schema analysis and field mappings. All agent-inferred constraints based on the current data will need to be re-validated.<br><br><strong>This action cannot be undone.</strong></div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn btn-r btn-sm" id="confirmChangeBtn">Yes, Switch Source</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TOOLTIP -->
<div class="tooltip" id="tooltip">
  <div class="tt-title" id="ttTitle"></div>
  <div id="ttBody"></div>
  <div class="tt-explain" id="ttExplain"></div>
</div>

<script>
// ── TAB SYSTEM ──
const tabData={
  data:{ctx:"DATA TAB · Schema analysis",msgs:[{t:400,m:"You're on the <span class='hc'>Data tab</span>. CSV source locked — to change source, you'll see a confirmation popup. Want me to review the 2 flagged fields?"},{t:1200,m:"Tip: <span class='hy'>W-04</span> has 3 consecutive shifts in your data. This will conflict with a shift rule if you add one."}],sugg:["Review flagged fields","Validate all 47 jobs","Explain entity mapping","Take me to KPI setup"]},
  kpi:{ctx:"KPI TAB · Objective weights",msgs:[{t:400,m:"You're defining KPIs. <span class='hc'>Cost 40% · Deadline 35% · Makespan 25%</span> — these weights generate 3 separate schedule variants."},{t:1200,m:"For manufacturing, Cost+Deadline combination is most common. Want industry-standard weight profiles?"}],sugg:["Suggest weight profile","What if I prioritize speed?","Explain KPI trade-offs"]},
  rules:{ctx:"RULES TAB · 2-step: AI → Confirm → Solve",msgs:[{t:400,m:"You're on the Rules tab. <span class='hc'>7 rules active.</span> Add a rule in plain English — I'll classify it as Hard or Soft with reasoning, and you confirm."},{t:1200,m:"<strong>Hard rules</strong> are must-satisfy constraints (machine limits, deadlines). <strong>Soft rules</strong> are preferences the solver will try to meet but can trade off if needed."}],sugg:["Why Hard vs Soft?","Any conflicts detected?","Suggest improvements","Generate schedule now"]},
  schedule:{ctx:"SCHEDULE TAB · Base + Dynamic modes",msgs:[{t:400,m:"<span class='hg'>3 variants ready.</span> K1 (Cost) is your main plan at <span class='hc'>82/100</span>. Each variant shows the strategy used to optimize."},{t:1200,m:"Switch to <strong>Dynamic Re-schedule</strong> mode to simulate a live disruption — M3 will go offline and ReOptimizerAgent will re-solve affected jobs."}],sugg:["Why is K2 better?","Show bottleneck","Simulate M3 failure","Open What-If sandbox"]},
  whatif:{ctx:"WHAT-IF TAB · Fully isolated sandbox",msgs:[{t:400,m:"You're in the <span class='ho'>What-If Sandbox</span>. Main plan is <strong>frozen</strong> — nothing here affects it."},{t:1200,m:"Main rules are listed in blue, sandbox-specific rules in orange. You can also upload new CSV data to overlay onto the sandbox — it won't touch the main dataset."}],sugg:["Add night shift rule","Upload extra jobs CSV","Compare vs main plan","Promote best result"]}
};
let currentTab="data",ruleCount=7,hardC=4,softC=2,objC=1,pendingC=0;

function showTab(id,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll(".page").forEach(p=>p.classList.remove("active"));
  document.querySelectorAll(".tab").forEach(b=>b.classList.remove("active"));
  document.getElementById("tab-"+id).classList.add("active");
  btn.classList.add("active");
  currentTab=id;
  if(id==="schedule")buildGantt("k1");
  if(id==="whatif")buildWiGantt();
  updateSidebar(id);
}
function updateSidebar(tab){
  const d=tabData[tab];
  document.getElementById("sbCtx").textContent=d.ctx;
  d.msgs.forEach(m=>setTimeout(()=>addSbMsg(m.m,"bot"),m.t));
  document.getElementById("sbSugg").innerHTML=d.sugg.map(s=>`<div class="ssb" onclick="sbQ(this)">${s}</div>`).join("");
}

// ── SIDEBAR ──
const sbR={
  "review flagged fields":"Fields flagged: <span class='hy'>worker_skill</span> ambiguous → mapped to Resource.capability. <span class='hy'>W-04</span> has 3 consecutive shifts — if you add a 'max 2 shifts' rule, solver will auto-reassign one job.",
  "what entities were detected":"5 types detected: <span class='hc'>Task</span> (jobs), <span class='hc'>Resource</span> (machines+workers), <span class='hc'>TimeSlot</span> (shifts), <span class='hc'>Capacity</span> (limits), <span class='hc'>Constraint</span> (rules). All mapped to domain-agnostic model.",
  "take me to kpi setup":"Switching to KPI tab. Set weights for Cost, Deadline, Makespan — these drive all 3 schedule variants.",
  "why hard vs soft":"<strong>Hard constraints</strong> = must always be satisfied (machine limits, deadlines). If unsatisfiable, solver fails and reports why. <strong>Soft preferences</strong> = solver tries its best but can trade off with a penalty cost if needed.",
  "any conflicts detected":"Currently <span class='hg'>0 conflicts</span>. All 7 rules are satisfiable with your data. If you add M2+M4 mutex, it will create an impact warning — not a hard conflict.",
  "suggest weight profile":"For <span class='hc'>manufacturing delivery</span>: Cost 35% · Deadline 45% · Makespan 20%. For <span class='hc'>high-volume throughput</span>: Makespan 50% · Cost 30% · Deadline 20%.",
  "why is k2 better":"K2 scores 91/100 — front-loads all HIGH-priority jobs in first 30%, giving 4–6hr deadline buffers. K1 saves cost by batching similar types but some medium-priority jobs start later.",
  "simulate m3 failure":"Switch to <strong>Dynamic Re-schedule</strong> mode in the Schedule tab. M3 goes offline at 14:00 — click Re-optimize to see how the agent re-routes 3 affected jobs.",
  "add night shift rule":"Going to the What-If sandbox. Add: 'Add 22:00–06:00 night shift on M1 and M4'. Based on your data, estimated gain: <span class='hg'>-17% makespan</span>.",
  "default":"Based on your <span class='hc'>47-job dataset</span> and active constraints, I can help with rule optimization, scenario analysis, or KPI trade-offs. What would you like to explore?"
};
function sbQ(el){const q=el.textContent.trim();addSbMsg(q,"user");showSbTyping();setTimeout(()=>{removeSbTyping();const k=Object.keys(sbR).find(x=>q.toLowerCase().includes(x));addSbMsg(sbR[k||"default"],"bot");},950);}
function sbSend(){const i=document.getElementById("sbInput"),t=i.value.trim();if(!t)return;i.value="";addSbMsg(t,"user");showSbTyping();setTimeout(()=>{removeSbTyping();const k=Object.keys(sbR).find(x=>t.toLowerCase().includes(x));addSbMsg(sbR[k||"default"],"bot");},950);}
function addSbMsg(html,role){const m=document.getElementById("sbMsgs"),d=document.createElement("div");d.className=`sbm ${role}`;d.innerHTML=html;m.appendChild(d);m.scrollTop=m.scrollHeight;}
function showSbTyping(){const m=document.getElementById("sbMsgs"),d=document.createElement("div");d.className="sbm bot";d.id="sbt";d.innerHTML='<div class="typing-ind"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>';m.appendChild(d);m.scrollTop=m.scrollHeight;}
function removeSbTyping(){const t=document.getElementById("sbt");if(t)t.remove();}

// ── DATA: SOURCE CHANGE MODAL ──
let pendingSrcName="";
function tryChangeSrc(el,name){
  if(el.classList.contains("on"))return;
  pendingSrcName=name;
  document.getElementById("modalDesc").innerHTML=`Switching from <strong>CSV/Excel</strong> to <strong>${name}</strong> will clear the current schema analysis and all field mappings. Agent-inferred constraints will need re-validation.<br><br><strong>This action cannot be undone.</strong>`;
  document.getElementById("changeModal").classList.add("open");
  document.getElementById("confirmChangeBtn").onclick=()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll(".src-card").forEach(c=>{c.classList.remove("on");const d=c.querySelector(".src-dot");if(d)d.remove();c.querySelector(".src-st").textContent="Click to connect";});
    el.classList.add("on");if(!el.querySelector(".src-dot")){const d=document.createElement("div");d.className="src-dot";el.prepend(d);}
    el.querySelector(".src-st").textContent="● Connecting...";
    setTimeout(()=>{el.querySelector(".src-st").textContent="● Connected";},1200);
    closeModal();addSbMsg(`<span class="hc">${name}</span> connected. Re-scanning schema...`,"bot");
  };
}
function closeModal(){document.getElementById("changeModal").classList.remove("open");}
document.getElementById("changeModal").addEventListener("click",e=>{if(e.target===e.currentTarget)closeModal();});

// ── KPI ──
function toggleKPI(card){
  const sel=document.querySelectorAll(".kdc.selected");
  if(card.classList.contains("selected")){card.classList.remove("selected");}
  else{if(sel.length>=3){addSbMsg("Max 3 KPIs active at once. Deselect one first.","bot");return;}card.classList.add("selected");}
  document.getElementById("kpiSelCount").textContent=document.querySelectorAll(".kdc.selected").length+" selected";
}

// ── RULES: 2-STEP AI → CONFIRM ──
function updateRuleSummary(){
  document.getElementById("ruleCountLabel").textContent=ruleCount+" rules";
  document.getElementById("rcBadge").textContent=ruleCount;
  document.getElementById("hardCount").textContent=hardC;
  document.getElementById("softCount").textContent=softC;
  document.getElementById("objCount").textContent=objC;
  document.getElementById("pendingCount").textContent=pendingC;
}
const ruleAI2={
  machine:{type:"HARD",tc:"tag-r",label:"HARD",meta:"Entity: Resource.runtime · Limit: 480min · Break: 30min",
    reasoning:"This is a <strong>Hard constraint</strong> because machine runtime limits are physical safety requirements — the solver must never violate them. If broken, it could cause equipment failure or safety hazards.",
    flag:null},
  worker:{type:"SOFT",tc:"tag-y",label:"SOFT",meta:"Entity: Worker.shift_streak ≤ 2 · Penalty: 30 per violation",
    reasoning:"I'm classifying this as <strong>Soft preference</strong> because while this is best practice, in emergency situations a worker might need to cover a 3rd shift. The solver will prefer to respect it but can trade off with a penalty.",
    flag:{type:"warn",title:"Data conflict: W-04 has 3 consecutive shifts",desc:"This rule will force a re-assignment for one of W-04's jobs. Solver will auto-select the next qualified worker."}},
  priority:{type:"SOFT",tc:"tag-y",label:"SOFT",meta:"Entity: Task.priority=HIGH · Weight:0.85 · Penalty:40/slot",
    reasoning:"<strong>Soft preference</strong> — priority ordering is a business preference, not a physical constraint. If a high-priority job has a dependency that blocks it, the solver needs flexibility to schedule it after the dependency clears.",
    flag:null},
  m2:{type:"HARD",tc:"tag-r",label:"HARD",meta:"Entity: Resource.mutex=[M2,M4] · No-overlap constraint",
    reasoning:"<strong>Hard constraint</strong> — you specified this is a power supply limitation. Running both simultaneously would trip the circuit breaker. This is a physical constraint with no flexibility.",
    flag:{type:"warn",title:"Impact: M2+M4 mutex covers 18 jobs (38% workload)",desc:"This may add ~0.4 days to makespan. Consider relaxing to Soft if the power concern is not absolute."}},
  minimize:{type:"OBJ",tc:"tag-c",label:"OBJ",meta:"Solver objective · CP-SAT minimize variable · Weight from KPIs",
    reasoning:"<strong>Optimization objective</strong> — this is not a constraint but a direction for the solver. CP-SAT will minimize the makespan variable as part of the weighted objective function.",
    flag:null},
};
function analyzeRule(){
  const input=document.getElementById("newRuleInput"),text=input.value.trim();
  if(!text)return;
  if(text.toLowerCase().includes("100%")||text.toLowerCase().includes("zero downtime")){
    showFlag("error","Impossible constraint detected",`"${text.substring(0,60)}..." — 100% utilization is physically impossible. Machines need setup time, maintenance, and buffers. Did you mean 90–95%?`);
    addSbMsg("🚫 <span class='hr'>Impossible rule blocked.</span> 100% utilization can't be achieved. Try 'maximize utilization above 85%' instead.","bot");
    return;
  }
  const key=Object.keys(ruleAI2).find(k=>text.toLowerCase().includes(k));
  const r=ruleAI2[key]||{type:"SOFT",tc:"tag-y",label:"SOFT",meta:"Entity: auto-classified · Agent-interpreted",reasoning:"I'm classifying this as <strong>Soft preference</strong> based on the phrasing — it doesn't indicate a physical limit or legal requirement. Override to Hard if this is a strict business rule.",flag:null};
  if(r.flag)showFlag(r.flag.type,r.flag.title,r.flag.desc);
  showPendingRule(text,r);
  input.value="";
  addSbMsg(`AI analysis complete. Rule classified as <span class="${r.tc.replace("tag-","h").replace("r","r").replace("y","y").replace("c","c")}">${r.label}</span>. Review the reasoning and confirm or override.`,"bot");
}
function showPendingRule(text,r){
  const area=document.getElementById("pendingArea");
  const div=document.createElement("div");div.className="rule-pending";
  const badgeStyle=r.label==="HARD"?"background:#FEE2E2;color:#DC2626;border:1px solid rgba(220,38,38,.3);":r.label==="SOFT"?"background:#FEF9C3;color:#CA8A04;border:1px solid rgba(202,138,4,.3);":"background:#EFF6FF;color:#1A56DB;border:1px solid rgba(26,86,219,.2);";
  div.innerHTML=`
    <div class="rp-header">
      <div class="rp-icon">🤖</div>
      <div class="rp-body">
        <div class="rp-original">"${text}"</div>
        <div class="rp-ai-box">
          <div class="rp-ai-label">AI Classification & Reasoning</div>
          <div class="rp-ai-text">${r.reasoning}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="rp-classify-row">
          <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m);">AI suggests:</span>
          <span class="rp-type-badge" style="${badgeStyle}">${r.label}</span>
          <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m);">Override:</span>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onclick="overrideType(this,'HARD','tag-r')">HARD</button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onclick="overrideType(this,'SOFT','tag-y')">SOFT</button>
        </div>
        <div class="rp-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-g btn-xs" onclick="confirmRule(this,'${r.label}','${r.tc}','${r.meta.replace(/'/g,"\'")}')">✓ Confirm & Add to Registry</button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onclick="rejectRule(this)">✗ Reject</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  area.appendChild(div);
  pendingC++;updateRuleSummary();
}
function overrideType(btn,newType,newTc){
  const card=btn.closest(".rule-pending");
  const badge=card.querySelector(".rp-type-badge");
  const badgeStyle=newType==="HARD"?"background:#FEE2E2;color:#DC2626;border:1px solid rgba(220,38,38,.3);":"background:#FEF9C3;color:#CA8A04;border:1px solid rgba(202,138,4,.3);";
  badge.textContent=newType;badge.style.cssText=badgeStyle;
  badge.dataset.type=newType;badge.dataset.tc=newTc;
  addSbMsg(`User overrode to <strong>${newType}</strong>. I'll note this preference for future similar rules.`,"bot");
}
function confirmRule(btn,type,tc,meta){
  const card=btn.closest(".rule-pending");
  const badge=card.querySelector(".rp-type-badge");
  const finalType=badge.dataset.type||type;
  const finalTc=badge.dataset.tc||tc;
  const text=card.querySelector(".rp-original").textContent.replace(/^"|"$/g,"");
  const list=document.getElementById("rulesList"),d=document.createElement("div");
  d.className="rule-item";
  d.innerHTML=`<span class="ri-tag ${finalTc}">${finalType}</span><div class="ri-body"><div class="ri-text" contenteditable="false">${text}</div><div class="ri-meta">${meta}</div><div class="ri-actions"><button class="ri-btn" onclick="editRule(this)">Edit</button><button class="ri-btn del" onclick="deleteRule(this)">Delete</button></div></div>`;
  list.appendChild(d);
  if(finalType==="HARD")hardC++;else if(finalType==="SOFT")softC++;else objC++;
  ruleCount++;pendingC--;card.remove();updateRuleSummary();
  addSbMsg(`✅ Rule confirmed as <strong>${finalType}</strong> and added to registry. ${pendingC>0?pendingC+" pending rules remaining.":"All rules confirmed — ready to generate schedule."}`,"bot");
  document.getElementById("analysisFb").innerHTML=`<div style="background:#F0FDF4;border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.2);border-radius:7px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--g);margin-top:4px;">✓ Rule added to registry. ${ruleCount} total rules active.</div>`;
}
function rejectRule(btn){
  const card=btn.closest(".rule-pending");
  pendingC--;card.remove();updateRuleSummary();
  addSbMsg("Rule rejected and discarded. You can rephrase and try again.","bot");
}
function showFlag(type,title,desc){
  const a=document.getElementById("flagsArea"),d=document.createElement("div");
  d.className=type==="error"?"flag-box":"warn-box";d.style.position="relative";
  d.innerHTML=`<div class="fb-title" style="color:${type==="error"?"var(--r)":"var(--y)"}">${type==="error"?"🚫":"⚠️"} ${title}</div><div class="fb-desc">${desc}</div><button onclick="this.parentElement.remove()" style="position:absolute;right:8px;top:8px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--m2);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;">×</button>`;
  a.appendChild(d);
}
function editRule(btn){
  const item=btn.closest(".rule-item"),txt=item.querySelector(".ri-text"),ed=item.classList.contains("editing");
  if(!ed){item.classList.add("editing");txt.contentEditable="true";txt.focus();btn.textContent="Save";}
  else{item.classList.remove("editing");txt.contentEditable="false";btn.textContent="Edit";addSbMsg("Rule saved and re-classified in registry.","bot");}
}
function deleteRule(btn){
  const item=btn.closest(".rule-item"),tag=item.querySelector(".ri-tag").textContent;
  if(tag==="HARD")hardC--;else if(tag==="SOFT")softC--;else objC--;
  ruleCount--;item.remove();updateRuleSummary();
}
function runSolverRules(){
  if(pendingC>0){addSbMsg(`⚠️ <span class="hy">${pendingC} pending rule(s) must be confirmed or rejected before generating the schedule.</span>`,"bot");return;}
  const btn=event.target;btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent="Running...";
  const steps=["Loading registry...","Building CP-SAT model...","47 jobs × 8 machines × 240 slots...","Generating 3 KPI variants...","✓ Done in 2.3s"];
  let i=0;const iv=setInterval(()=>{
    if(i<steps.length)addSbMsg(steps[i++],"bot");
    else{clearInterval(iv);btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent="▶ Re-generate";
    addSbMsg("✅ <span class='hg'>3 variants ready.</span> Switch to the Schedule tab to view and select your main plan.","bot");
    showTab("schedule",document.querySelectorAll(".tab")[3]);}
  },550);
}

// ── SCHEDULE ──
let currentMode="base";
const variants={
  k1:{label:"K1 Cost-Optimized",machines:[
    {n:"M1",bars:[{j:"J-001",s:0,w:18,c:"b1",d:"3.5h"},{j:"J-005",s:20,w:10,c:"b2",d:"1.5h"},{j:"J-021",s:33,w:22,c:"b3",d:"4h"}]},
    {n:"M2",bars:[{j:"J-003",s:5,w:16,c:"b2",d:"2.5h"},{j:"J-009",s:23,w:20,c:"b5",d:"4h"},{j:"J-017",s:47,w:27,c:"b1",d:"5h"}]},
    {n:"M3",bars:[{j:"J-002",s:0,w:34,c:"b3",d:"6h"},{j:"MNT",s:35,w:4,c:"bmnt",d:""},{j:"J-014",s:41,w:24,c:"b4",d:"4.5h"}]},
    {n:"M4",bars:[{j:"J-004",s:0,w:25,c:"b4",d:"4h"},{j:"J-011",s:27,w:17,c:"b1",d:"3h"},{j:"J-024",s:47,w:28,c:"b2",d:"5h"}]},
    {n:"M5",bars:[{j:"J-007",s:8,w:20,c:"b5",d:"3.5h"},{j:"J-016",s:30,w:34,c:"b3",d:"6h"}]},
  ]},
  k2:{label:"K2 Deadline-First",machines:[
    {n:"M1",bars:[{j:"J-005",s:0,w:10,c:"b2",d:"1.5h"},{j:"J-001",s:11,w:18,c:"b1",d:"3.5h"},{j:"J-021",s:31,w:22,c:"b3",d:"4h"}]},
    {n:"M2",bars:[{j:"J-003",s:0,w:16,c:"b2",d:"2.5h"},{j:"J-009",s:18,w:20,c:"b5",d:"4h"},{j:"J-017",s:40,w:27,c:"b1",d:"5h"}]},
    {n:"M3",bars:[{j:"J-002",s:0,w:34,c:"b3",d:"6h"},{j:"MNT",s:35,w:4,c:"bmnt",d:""},{j:"J-014",s:40,w:24,c:"b4",d:"4.5h"}]},
    {n:"M4",bars:[{j:"J-004",s:0,w:25,c:"b4",d:"4h"},{j:"J-011",s:27,w:17,c:"b1",d:"3h"}]},
    {n:"M5",bars:[{j:"J-007",s:0,w:20,c:"b5",d:"3.5h"},{j:"J-016",s:22,w:34,c:"b3",d:"6h"}]},
  ]},
  k3:{label:"K3 Makespan-Optimized",machines:[
    {n:"M1",bars:[{j:"J-001",s:0,w:18,c:"b1",d:"3.5h"},{j:"J-005",s:19,w:10,c:"b2",d:"1.5h"},{j:"J-021",s:30,w:22,c:"b3",d:"4h"},{j:"J-033",s:53,w:17,c:"b4",d:"3h"}]},
    {n:"M2",bars:[{j:"J-003",s:0,w:16,c:"b2",d:"2.5h"},{j:"J-009",s:17,w:20,c:"b5",d:"4h"},{j:"J-017",s:38,w:27,c:"b1",d:"5h"}]},
    {n:"M3",bars:[{j:"J-002",s:0,w:28,c:"b3",d:"5h"},{j:"MNT",s:29,w:4,c:"bmnt",d:""},{j:"J-014",s:34,w:22,c:"b4",d:"4h"}]},
    {n:"M4",bars:[{j:"J-004",s:0,w:25,c:"b4",d:"4h"},{j:"J-011",s:26,w:17,c:"b1",d:"3h"},{j:"J-024",s:44,w:28,c:"b2",d:"5h"}]},
    {n:"M5",bars:[{j:"J-007",s:2,w:20,c:"b5",d:"3.5h"},{j:"J-016",s:23,w:34,c:"b3",d:"6h"}]},
  ]},
  k1_dynamic:{label:"K1 Cost · Post-Disruption",machines:[
    {n:"M1",bars:[{j:"J-001",s:0,w:18,c:"b1",d:"3.5h"},{j:"J-005",s:20,w:10,c:"b2",d:"1.5h"}]},
    {n:"M2",bars:[{j:"J-003",s:5,w:16,c:"b2",d:"2.5h"},{j:"J-031",s:24,w:18,c:"b5",d:"3h · rerouted"}]},
    {n:"M3 ⚡",bars:[{j:"J-002",s:0,w:28,c:"b3",d:"5h"},{j:"OFFLINE",s:37,w:63,c:"b-offline",d:""}]},
    {n:"M4",bars:[{j:"J-004",s:0,w:25,c:"b4",d:"4h"},{j:"J-018",s:27,w:20,c:"b1",d:"3.5h · rerouted"}]},
    {n:"M6",bars:[{j:"J-007",s:8,w:20,c:"b5",d:"3.5h"},{j:"J-002b",s:30,w:14,c:"b3",d:"rerouted"}]},
  ]},
};
const ticks=["6h","7h","8h","9h","10h","11h","12h","13h","14h","15h","16h","17h","18h","19h","20h","D2","D3","D4","D5","→"];

function buildGantt(vid){
  const v=variants[vid]||variants["k1"];
  document.getElementById("ganttHead").innerHTML=ticks.map(t=>`<div class="gh-tick">${t}</div>`).join("");
  const rows=document.getElementById("ganttRows");rows.innerHTML="";
  v.machines.forEach(m=>{
    const row=document.createElement("div");row.className="gm-row";
    if(m.n.includes("⚡"))row.style.background="#FEF2F2";
    const label=document.createElement("div");label.className="gm-label";label.textContent=m.n;
    if(m.n.includes("⚡"))label.style.color="var(--r)";
    const track=document.createElement("div");track.className="gm-track";
    ticks.forEach((_,i)=>{const gl=document.createElement("div");gl.style.cssText=`position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;left:${i/ticks.length*100}%;width:1px;background:var(--bd);opacity:.5;`;track.appendChild(gl);});
    m.bars.forEach(b=>{
      const bar=document.createElement("div");bar.className=`gbar ${b.c}`;
      bar.style.left=b.s+"%";bar.style.width=b.w+"%";
      if(b.c==="b-offline"){bar.style.width="61%";bar.style.left="38%";bar.style.justifyContent="center";bar.innerHTML=`<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--r);font-weight:700;">OFFLINE</span>`;}
      else bar.textContent=b.j+(b.d?" · "+b.d:"");
      bar.addEventListener("click",e=>showTT(e,b));
      bar.addEventListener("mouseleave",()=>document.getElementById("tooltip").style.display="none");
      track.appendChild(bar);
    });
    row.appendChild(label);row.appendChild(track);rows.appendChild(row);
  });
}
function setMode(btn,mode){
  document.querySelectorAll(".sc-btn").forEach(b=>b.classList.remove("active"));
  btn.classList.add("active");
  currentMode=mode;
  document.getElementById("modeLabel").textContent=mode==="base"?"Base Plan":"Dynamic Re-schedule";
  document.getElementById("disruptBanner").style.display=mode==="dynamic"?"flex":"none";
  document.getElementById("resolvedBanner").style.display="none";
  if(mode==="dynamic")addSbMsg("⚡ <strong>Dynamic mode active.</strong> M3 has gone offline at 14:00. Click <strong>Re-optimize Now</strong> to see the agent re-route 3 affected jobs.","bot");
  selVariant(document.querySelector(".kvc.selected")||document.querySelector(".kvc"),mode==="dynamic"?"k1_dynamic":"k1");
}
function selVariant(card,vid){
  document.querySelectorAll(".kvc").forEach(c=>c.classList.remove("selected"));
  if(card)card.classList.add("selected");
  const v=variants[vid]||variants["k1"];
  document.getElementById("varLabel").textContent=v.label;
  buildGantt(vid);
}
function resolveDisruption(){
  const btn=event.target;btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent="Re-optimizing...";
  setTimeout(()=>{
