    document.getElementById("disruptBanner").style.display="none";
    document.getElementById("resolvedBanner").style.display="flex";
    addSbMsg("✅ <span class='hg'>Re-optimization complete.</span> J-002→M4, J-018→M6, J-031→M2. +1.4hr total impact. Zero deadline violations.","bot");
  },2200);
}
function showTT(e,b){
  if(b.c==="bmnt"||b.c==="b-offline")return;
  const tt=document.getElementById("tooltip");
  document.getElementById("ttTitle").textContent=b.j;
  document.getElementById("ttBody").innerHTML=`<div class="tt-row"><span class="tt-label">Duration</span><span class="tt-val">${b.d||"—"}</span></div><div class="tt-row"><span class="tt-label">Status</span><span class="tt-val" style="color:var(--g)">✓ On track</span></div>`;
  document.getElementById("ttExplain").innerHTML=`<strong>PlanExplainerAgent:</strong> Assigned here due to machine capability match and earliest available window. Deadline satisfied with ${Math.floor(Math.random()*4+1)}hr buffer.`;
  tt.style.display="block";tt.style.left=(e.clientX+12)+"px";tt.style.top=(e.clientY-10)+"px";
}
document.addEventListener("click",e=>{if(!e.target.classList.contains("gbar"))document.getElementById("tooltip").style.display="none";});

// ── WHAT-IF ──
function addWiRule(){
  const input=document.getElementById("wiRuleInput"),text=input.value.trim();if(!text)return;
  const sandbox=document.getElementById("wiSandboxRules");
  const ph=sandbox.querySelector("div[style*=italic]");if(ph)ph.remove();
  const d=document.createElement("div");d.className="wi-rule sandbox-rule";
  d.innerHTML=`<input type="checkbox" checked><span class="wi-rule-text">${text}</span><span class="tag tag-o" style="margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;">SANDBOX</span><button onclick="this.parentElement.remove()" style="border:none;background:none;color:var(--m2);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;margin-left:4px;">×</button>`;
  sandbox.appendChild(d);input.value="";
  addSbMsg(`Sandbox rule added: "<span class="ho">${text.substring(0,45)}${text.length>45?"...":""}</span>". Main plan untouched.`,"bot");
}
function wiUploadData(){
  const zone=document.getElementById("wiUploadZone"),status=document.getElementById("wiDataStatus");
  zone.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:18px;margin-bottom:4px;">⏳</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--m);font-weight:500;">Processing upload...</div>';
  setTimeout(()=>{
    zone.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:18px;margin-bottom:4px;">✅</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--g);font-weight:600;">extra_jobs_q3.csv merged</div><div style="font-family:JetBrains Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--m);margin-top:2px;">+8 new jobs overlaid onto sandbox</div>';
    status.innerHTML='<div style="background:#F0FDF4;border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.2);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--g);">✓ 8 new jobs merged. Main dataset untouched. Sandbox now has 55 jobs.</div>';
    addSbMsg("Sandbox data updated — <span class='hg'>+8 jobs merged</span> from extra_jobs_q3.csv. Main dataset unchanged. Re-run simulation to see impact.","bot");
  },1500);
}
function runWiSolver(){
  const btn=event.target;btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent="Running sandbox...";
  const st=document.getElementById("wiStatus");
  const steps=["Cloning main registry...","Applying sandbox rules...","K1 Cost variant...","K2 Deadline variant...","K3 Makespan variant...","✓ 3 variants ready"];
  let i=0;const iv=setInterval(()=>{
    if(i<steps.length)st.textContent=steps[i++];
    else{clearInterval(iv);btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent="▶ Re-run Sandbox";
    document.getElementById("wiResults").style.display="block";buildWiGantt();
    addSbMsg("✅ <span class='hg'>Sandbox complete.</span> K3 gains 17% makespan. Main plan untouched — promote when ready.","bot");}
  },600);
}
function buildWiGantt(){
  const c=document.getElementById("wiGantt");if(!c)return;c.innerHTML="";
  [{n:"M1",bars:[{j:"J-001",s:0,w:18,c:"diff-same"},{j:"J-005",s:19,w:10,c:"diff-same"},{j:"NIGHT★",s:70,w:18,c:"diff-new"}]},
   {n:"M2",bars:[{j:"J-003",s:5,w:16,c:"diff-same"},{j:"J-009",s:17,w:20,c:"diff-moved"}]},
   {n:"M3",bars:[{j:"J-002",s:0,w:28,c:"diff-same"},{j:"MNT",s:29,w:4,c:"bmnt"},{j:"J-014",s:34,w:22,c:"diff-moved"}]},
   {n:"M4 ★",bars:[{j:"J-004",s:0,w:25,c:"diff-same"},{j:"NIGHT★",s:70,w:22,c:"diff-new"}]},
  ].forEach(m=>{
    const row=document.createElement("div");row.style.cssText="display:flex;align-items:center;height:32px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);";
    const label=document.createElement("div");label.style.cssText="width:80px;flex-shrink:0;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--m);padding:0 8px;font-weight:500;";label.textContent=m.n;
    const track=document.createElement("div");track.style.cssText="flex:1;position:relative;height:100%;";
    m.bars.forEach(b=>{const bar=document.createElement("div");bar.className=`diff-bar ${b.c}`;bar.style.left=b.s+"%";bar.style.width=b.w+"%";bar.textContent=b.j;track.appendChild(bar);});
    row.appendChild(label);row.appendChild(track);c.appendChild(row);
  });
}
function promoteWi(){
  addSbMsg("✅ <span class='hg'>Sandbox K3 promoted to main plan.</span> Schedule tab updated. Previous plan saved to history.","bot");
  showTab("schedule",document.querySelectorAll(".tab")[3]);
}
buildWiGantt();
</script>
</body>
</html>
